modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in a mixed and uneven structure and use a short and minimal tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be several noticeable typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need to create a shared folder in DocuSign for templates.

full_description_text: 
I want to make a folder in DocuSign. It is for our group, so we can use and share templates. I don’t know how to do this, and it is important for our work. Please help with this folder creation, it is very needed.
short_description: Need to create a shared folder in DocuSign for templates.
description: I want to make a folder in DocuSign. It is for our group, so we can use and share templates. I don’t know how to do this, and it is important for our work. Please help with this folder creation, it is very needed.
